name: health_accessibility
description: Health-facility accessibility — four concentric walking isochrones (500 m / 750 m / 1 km / 1.5 km, ~5 / 7.5 / 10 / 15 min) on the BD TOPO road network in EPSG:2154 from Santé facilities, computed in ONE Dijkstra pass via cost_budgets. classify_by_ring then tags every building with the smallest ring that contains it and paints it from a 5-band palette (green = inside 500 m, yellow/orange/red for the 750/1000/1500 m rings, dark red = beyond 1.5 km).
